name: ServiceAccountCredentials
description: ServiceAccountCredentials schema from Palo Alto Networks SASE IAM Service API

key_id.description: Unique identifier of the generated key.

client_id.description: OAuth 2.0 client ID for this credential set.

client_secret.description: OAuth 2.0 client secret. Returned only once at creation time. Store this value securely as it cannot be retrieved again.

description.description: Description provided when the key was created.

expires_at.description: Expiration timestamp, or null if credentials do not expire.
